name: authelia
title: Authelia
description: SSO and two-factor authentication for all your services. Protects apps behind Traefik with single sign-on, WebAuthn, TOTP, and access control policies.

variables.name: HOST_PORT
variables.label: Host Port
variables.description: Port exposed on the host (Traefik routes internally, this is for direct access)

variables.name: AUTHELIA_ADMIN_USER
variables.label: Admin Username
variables.description: Primary admin username for Authelia login

variables.name: AUTHELIA_ADMIN_DISPLAY
variables.label: Display Name
variables.description: Full name shown in the Authelia portal

variables.name: AUTHELIA_ADMIN_EMAIL
variables.label: Admin Email
variables.description: Email address for notifications and password resets

variables.name: AUTHELIA_ADMIN_PASSWORD
variables.label: Admin Password
variables.description: Password for the admin account (will be hashed with Argon2id)
